title: imagebuildah: rework unused-argument detection
body:
Walk the raw parsed tree to try to catch argument values that we're passed that aren't used in the Dockerfile.  Upper-case the command in the Step structure in all of the places where we compare it to a known value.

This should fix #1500.

comments.body: The changes LGTM, but I'd like to test it, will do so early Monday morn if not merged prior.
LGTM and tests well, @umohnani8 if you have a minute, PTAL
